hero.title: Mhaol Ecosystem
hero.subtitle: Your media, your files, your rules. The Mhaol Ecosystem is a suite of open-source apps that give you full ownership and control over your movies, music, photos, and more — no subscriptions, no surveillance, no lock-in.

apps.heading: The Apps
apps.subheading: Each app in the ecosystem has its own identity, purpose, and personality.

server.title: Server
server.description: Your movie library. AI-powered torrent search, TMDB metadata, and instant streaming.

tube.title: Tube
tube.description: Alternative YouTube client. Download, stream, and organize videos without ads or tracking.

tv.title: TV
tv.description: TV show tracker and streamer. Browse series, manage episodes, and stream with torrent integration.

books.title: Books
books.description: Ebook reader and library. Read EPUBs and PDFs, track progress, and organize your collection offline.

shepperd.title: Shepperd
shepperd.description: Browser extension that collects your watch and listen history from Netflix, HBO Max, Amazon Prime, Disney+, Spotify, and more.

platforms.heading: Download
platforms.macos_install: After downloading, remove the quarantine attribute to run the app.
platforms.linux_install: Make the AppImage executable and run it.

footer.tagline: Free, open-source media ecosystem for everyone.
footer.built_with: Built with Svelte, Tauri, and Rust.
